revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with '{{Sidebar | title = Related links | content1 = [[Module talk:L-rail|Discussion]] | content2 = [[Module:L-rail/sandbox|Module sandbox]] | content3 = Module:L-ra...'
revision.text: {{Sidebar | title = Related links | content1 = [[Module talk:L-rail|Discussion]] | content2 = [[Module:L-rail/sandbox|Module sandbox]] | content3 = [[Module:L-rail/sandbox2|Module sandbox 2]] | content4 = [[Module:L-rail/WMATA/sandbox|Data module for testcases]] | content5 = [[Template:L-rail/testcases|Testcases]] | content6 = [[Template:L-rail/testcases|Testcases 2]] | content7 = [[Module:L-rail|Live module]] | content8 = [[Template:L-rail|Live template]] | content9 = [[Template:L-rail/sandbox|Template sandbox]] | content10 = [[Template:S-rail|S-rail]] | content11 = [[Template:S-line|S-line]] }}

revision.comment: generalized
revision.text:
{{Sidebar | title = Related links | content1 =
* [[Template:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|Template]] ([[Template talk:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|talk]]) * [[Module:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|Module]] ([[Module talk:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|talk]]) * [[Template:{{BASEPAGENAME}}/sandbox|Template sandbox]] ([[Template:{{BASEPAGENAME}}/sandbox2|2]]) * [[Module:{{BASEPAGENAME}}/sandbox|Module sandbox]] ([[Module:{{BASEPAGENAME}}/sandbox2|2]]) * [[Template:{{BASEPAGENAME}}/testcases|Testcases]]
| content2 = {{{1|}}} }}

revision.comment: Jc86035 moved page [[Template:Sidebar Adjacent stations]] to [[Template:Lua sidebar]]
revision.text:
{{Sidebar | title = Related links | content1 =
* [[Template:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|Template]] ([[Template talk:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|talk]]) * [[Module:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|Module]] ([[Module talk:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|talk]]) * [[Template:{{BASEPAGENAME}}/sandbox|Template sandbox]] ([[Template:{{BASEPAGENAME}}/sandbox2|2]]) * [[Module:{{BASEPAGENAME}}/sandbox|Module sandbox]] ([[Module:{{BASEPAGENAME}}/sandbox2|2]]) * [[Template:{{BASEPAGENAME}}/testcases|Testcases]]
| content2 = {{{1|}}} }}

revision.comment: redirect handling
ce
{{div col}}
ce
doc
Introduce a 2nd unnamed parameter to specify an alternate basepagename, to make this usable on sub-templates/modules
Undid revision 838810748 by [[Special:Contributions/Tom.Reding|Tom.Reding]] ([[User talk:Tom.Reding|talk]])
{{{title}}}
Rem double doc
{{{template}}} and {{{module}}}
ce
this might be a better subheader
link to "Module talk" page for Module testcases, which displays the output of the testcases (better than the programming in most cases)
remove div col which basically has no effect, move to tstyles (set width to auto instead of guessing)
reduce expansion size slightly
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Lua_sidebar]]
add tracking cat similar to [[:Template:Lua banner]]
21 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Lua_sidebar]]
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{Sidebar | class = lua-sidebar | templatestyles = Template:Lua sidebar/styles.css | title = Related pages | content1 = {{plainlist}} * [[Template:{{{template|{{{title|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}}}}|Template]] {{#if:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|Template talk:{{{template|{{{title|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}||([[Template talk:{{{template|{{{title|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}}}}|talk]])}} * [[Template:{{{template|{{{title|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}}}}/sandbox|Template sandbox]] * [[Template:{{{template|{{{title|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}}}}/testcases|Template testcases]] * [[Template:{{{template|{{{title|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}}}}/doc|Template doc]] * [[Special:PrefixIndex/Template:{{{template|{{{title|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}}}}/|Template subpages]] * [[Module:{{{module|{{{title|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}}}}|Module]] {{#if:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|Module talk:{{{module|{{{title|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}||([[Module talk:{{{module|{{{title|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}}}}|talk]])}} * [[Module:{{{module|{{{title|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}}}}/sandbox|Module sandbox]] * [[Module talk:{{{module|{{{title|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}}}}/testcases|Module testcases]] * [[Module:{{{module|{{{title|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}}}}/doc|Module doc]] * [[Special:PrefixIndex/Module:{{{module|{{{title|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}}}}/|Module subpages]] {{endplainlist}} | content2 = {{{1|}}} }}[[Category:Lua-based templates]]<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23511227343|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Sidebar | class = lua-sidebar | templatestyles = Template:Lua sidebar/styles.css | title = Related pages | content1 = {{plainlist}} * [[Template:{{{template|{{{title|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}}}}|Template]] {{#if:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|Template talk:{{{template|{{{title|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}||([[Template talk:{{{template|{{{title|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}}}}|talk]])}} * [[Template:{{{template|{{{title|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}}}}/sandbox|Template sandbox]] * [[Template:{{{template|{{{title|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}}}}/testcases|Template testcases]] * [[Template:{{{template|{{{title|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}}}}/doc|Template doc]] * [[Special:PrefixIndex/Template:{{{template|{{{title|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}}}}/|Template subpages]] * [[Module:{{{module|{{{title|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}}}}|Module]] {{#if:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|Module talk:{{{module|{{{title|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}||([[Module talk:{{{module|{{{title|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}}}}|talk]])}} * [[Module:{{{module|{{{title|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}}}}/sandbox|Module sandbox]] * [[Module talk:{{{module|{{{title|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}}}}/testcases|Module testcases]] * [[Module:{{{module|{{{title|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}}}}/doc|Module doc]] * [[Special:PrefixIndex/Module:{{{module|{{{title|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}}}}/|Module subpages]] {{endplainlist}} | content2 = {{{1|}}} }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Lua-based templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
